access-control.description: Explicit access control defined for CRUD operations

user-owned.description: Collection with owner field and isOwner access control

published-content.description: Collection with publishedAt field and isPublished access control

rbac.description: Role-based access control with admin/user roles

src/infra/auth/oauth_crypto.ts.aiSummary: AES-256-GCM encryption for OAuth login secrets

src/infra/auth/oauth_nonce.ts.aiSummary: Generate cryptographically secure random nonces for CSRF protection

src/infra/auth/oauth_sanitize.ts.aiSummary: Sanitize returnTo URLs to prevent open redirect vulnerabilities

src/infra/auth/oauth_session.ts.aiSummary: Issue Payload auth sessions using payload.login() for OAuth users

src/infra/auth/oauth_state.ts.aiSummary: Manage OAuth state nonces and returnTo URLs for CSRF protection

src/infra/auth/oauth_url.ts.aiSummary: Build canonical public base URLs for OAuth callbacks

Clears all values in Admin UI responses (secrets-only collection), but skips for internal runtime load
